scripts.serve:lab1: concurrently -k -n student,course,enrollment,academe -c cyan,green,magenta,yellow "bash scripts/lab1/serve-microservice.sh student" "bash scripts/lab1/serve-microservice.sh course" "bash scripts/lab1/serve-microservice.sh enrollment" "bash scripts/lab1/serve-academe.sh"
scripts.serve:lab2: concurrently -k -n student,course,enrollment -c cyan,green,magenta "bash scripts/lab2/serve.sh student" "bash scripts/lab2/serve.sh course" "bash scripts/lab2/serve.sh enrollment"
